description: Examine Go Source Code & Initialize Rust Project
steps: Review the source code structure from https://github.com/router-for-me/CLIProxyAPI to understand data flows
Set up an Axum/Actix-web server project in Rust
Create API routing for provider translation matching the original Go implementation
Verify server accepts and correctly routes basic API requests
Study sdk/auth/filestore.go and sdk/auth/manager.go
Create src/auth/store.rs — read/write token files from auth-dir per provider
Create src/auth/manager.rs — enumerate accounts, list available credentials per provider
Support multiple account files per provider (antigravity_0.json, antigravity_1.json, etc.)
Verify accounts load at startup and are available to ProxyState
Study internal/auth/antigravity/ — auth.go, constants.go, filename.go
Implement Antigravity OAuth flow in src/auth/antigravity.rs
Add token persistence to auth-dir (~/.rusuh/antigravity_*.json)
Add token refresh logic with expiry checking
Wire `rusuh antigravity-login` CLI command to trigger the flow
Verify token is acquired, stored, and loadable by account manager
Study internal/runtime/executor/antigravity_executor.go (55KB — complex)
Create src/providers/antigravity.rs implementing Provider trait
Implement OpenAI ↔ Antigravity request/response translation
Handle Antigravity-specific streaming format
Wire into ProxyState from auth store accounts at startup
Verify end-to-end chat completion via Antigravity

description: Provider Registration & Model Registry — full implementation with reference counting, quota tracking, per-client model tracking, suspension/resume, provider-specific ModelInfo, cleanup, static model definitions (Claude/Gemini/OpenAI/Qwen/Antigravity), handler-type model conversion (OpenAI/Claude/Gemini)
steps: Study internal/registry/model_registry.go and model_definitions_static_data.go
Create src/providers/model_info.rs — ExtModelInfo + ThinkingSupport types matching Go ModelInfo
Create src/providers/static_models.rs — Claude/Gemini/OpenAI/Qwen/Antigravity static model catalogs with full metadata

Create src/providers/model_registry.rs — ModelRegistry with register/unregister, ref counting, quota exceeded tracking, suspension/resume, per-provider model info, handler-type model conversion (OpenAI/Claude/Gemini), cleanup, client_supports_model
Wire ModelRegistry into ProxyState and main.rs serve() startup
Register all providers into model registry at startup with list_models()
Verify project compiles with no errors

description: Request Router & Model Dispatch — model→provider resolution via ModelRegistry, OAuth model alias from config, provider hint filtering, handler-type model conversion for /v1/models (OpenAI/Gemini), fallback to direct provider query
steps: Study sdk/cliproxy/auth/conductor.go, sdk/api/handlers/handlers.go, internal/util/provider.go
Implement resolve_oauth_model_alias() in handlers.rs — alias→name rewriting from config oauth-model-alias
Rewrite route_chat() to: (1) apply model alias, (2) query ModelRegistry.get_model_providers(), (3) filter by provider_hint if set, (4) fallback to all providers, (5) try candidates in order
Update list_models/list_models_gemini/amp_list_models to use ModelRegistry.get_available_models() with handler-type conversion
Verify project compiles with no errors
Implement SSE stream forwarding in src/proxy/stream.rs
Handle chunked transfer encoding from Antigravity upstream
Convert Antigravity streaming format to OpenAI SSE format
Handle stream interruption and error propagation
Verify streaming works end-to-end
Create src/middleware/auth.rs — validate Bearer token or x-api-key header
Check against config api-keys list
Skip auth for /health and localhost management endpoints
Return 401 with OpenAI-compatible error format on failure
Wire middleware into router
Study sdk/cliproxy/auth/selector.go for round-robin account selection
Create src/proxy/balancer.rs — round-robin and fill-first strategies
Track per-account request counters with AtomicU64
Integrate balancer into request router for multi-account Antigravity
Verify requests are evenly distributed across accounts
Implement configurable retry logic (config request-retry count)
Retry on transient upstream errors (5xx, timeout, connection reset)
Skip to next account on account-specific failures (401, 429)
Add exponential backoff between retries
Log retry attempts

description: Antigravity Runtime Token Refresh — auto-refresh access_token before expiry on every request, matching Go ensureAccessToken() with 50min refresh skew
steps: Add RwLock-wrapped token state to AntigravityProvider (access_token, refresh_token, expiry)
Implement ensure_access_token() — check expiry with 50min skew, refresh via refresh_access_token() if needed
Wire ensure_access_token() into chat() request path before building upstream request
Persist refreshed tokens back to auth file on disk
Add unit test for token expiry logic

description: AuthRecord Status Fields & Project ID Auto-Discovery — extend AuthRecord with status/suspended/last_refreshed_at fields, auto-fetch project_id on load for antigravity accounts missing it
steps: Add AuthStatus enum (Active/Disabled/Suspended) and status fields to AuthRecord
Update read_auth_file() and save() to handle new fields
Add project_id auto-fetch during AccountManager::reload() for antigravity accounts without project_id
Add get_by_id() and update() methods to AccountManager
Verify existing auth files load with correct defaults

description: Management API — Auth File CRUD — list/upload/download/delete/patch auth files via /v0/management/ endpoints, matching Go management handler
steps: GET /v0/management/auth-files — list all auth files with metadata (id, type, email, status, size, modtime)
POST /v0/management/auth-files?name=x.json — upload auth file (raw JSON body), save to auth-dir, reload accounts
DELETE /v0/management/auth-files?name=x.json — delete single file; ?all=true deletes all
GET /v0/management/auth-files/download?name=x.json — download raw JSON with Content-Disposition header
PATCH /v0/management/auth-files/status — toggle disabled state {name, disabled}
PATCH /v0/management/auth-files/fields — update prefix/proxy_url/priority {name, priority}
GET /v0/management/auth-files/models?name=x.json — return models for specific auth file
Register all routes in router/mod.rs under /v0/management/

description: Management API — Web OAuth Trigger for Antigravity — start OAuth flow via HTTP endpoint (not CLI), with callback handling and session tracking
steps: GET /v0/management/antigravity-auth-url — generate OAuth URL, start background flow, return {status, url, state}
GET /antigravity/callback?code=...&state=... — receive OAuth callback, exchange code, save token, reload
Add in-memory OAuthSession tracker (state → pending/complete/error)
GET /v0/management/auth-status?state=... — poll session status for web UI
Wire callback route at top-level router (not under /v0/management/)
Verify: trigger auth URL via curl, complete OAuth, credentials saved
Study internal/auth/gemini/gemini_auth.go and gemini_token.go
Implement Google OAuth2 device-code flow in src/auth/gemini.rs
Add token persistence, wire `rusuh login` CLI command
Study internal/auth/codex/ — openai_auth.go, oauth_server.go, pkce.go, token.go
Implement PKCE-based OAuth + device-code flow in src/auth/codex.rs
Persist tokens, wire `rusuh codex-login` and `rusuh codex-device-login`
Study internal/auth/claude/ — anthropic_auth.go, oauth_server.go, pkce.go, token.go
Implement Anthropic OAuth flow with PKCE in src/auth/claude.rs
Persist tokens, wire `rusuh claude-login` CLI command
Implement Qwen OAuth flow in src/auth/qwen.rs
Implement iFlow OAuth flow in src/auth/iflow.rs
Persist tokens, wire CLI commands
Create src/providers/gemini_api.rs — API key-based
Create src/providers/gemini_cli.rs — OAuth-based
Implement OpenAI ↔ Gemini request/response translation
Support streaming and non-streaming
Create src/providers/codex.rs, claude.rs, qwen.rs, iflow.rs
Implement per-provider request/response translations
Support streaming SSE
Create src/providers/openai_compat.rs — config-driven (e.g. OpenRouter)
Forward requests with API key injection and header overrides
Support streaming and non-streaming
Implement native Claude Messages API handler
Implement Gemini generateContent/streamGenerateContent handlers
Route to respective providers or translate

description: [Optional] Management API, Quota, Amp CLI, Proxy, TLS, Logging
steps: Expand management API (accounts, config reload, usage)
Add quota tracking with auto-failover
Add Amp CLI provider routing with model mapping
Add SOCKS5/HTTP proxy support
Add TLS + config hot-reload
Add structured request logging with log rotation

description: [Optional] OpenAI Responses API, WebSocket, Thinking Support
steps: Implement /v1/responses with full Responses API semantics
Add WebSocket relay for Codex sessions
Implement thinking block extraction/forwarding per provider
